entries.round: task:Rewrite 'spec.md' and 'tasks.md' to reflect the massive architectural shift: completely removing Sanity CMS and adopting a custom MongoDB (Mongoose) backend with a bespoke Next.js Admin Panel (/admin). 1. Update spec.md to detail the MongoDB schemas, the custom admin dashboard (e.g., using TipTap for rich text, NextAuth for security), and the English category taxonomy (News, Markets, Web3 & DeFi, Tutorials, Reviews). 2. Update tasks.md (preserve completed Phase 1-3 checkmarks but cross out or replace Sanity-specific ones) and add a new Phase 4 for building the custom Admin UI, connecting the frontend to MongoDB, and setting up auth. MUST use <write_file> tags for both files.
